summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 117 features: Live Market Data API, User Profile CRUD, Age Pension Calculator, and Dashboard UI. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all features working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Market Data API uses Yahoo Finance with 5-min caching (source: live/cache/fallback). User Profile API persists to MongoDB. Age Pension calculator implements 2025-2026 Services Australia rates. Edit Profile dialog has data-testid='edit-profile-btn'.

live_market_data_api.details: Returns ASX 200, S&P 500, AUD/USD, 10Y Bond with live Yahoo Finance data

market_indicators_display.details: Dashboard shows ASX 200 (8,516.3), S&P 500 (6,368.85), AUD/USD (0.687), 10Y Bond (4.44)

live_data_badge.details: Live badge visible when market data is from Yahoo Finance

edit_profile_button.details: Pencil icon button with data-testid='edit-profile-btn' opens dialog

edit_profile_dialog.details: All fields present with correct default values

user_profile_api_get.details: Returns profile with display_name, age, years_to_retirement, combined_income

user_profile_api_update.details: Updates profile and persists to MongoDB

age_pension_calculator.details: Returns eligibility, payment estimates, assets/income test results, recommendations

age_pension_rates.details: Returns 2025-2026 Services Australia pension rates and thresholds

mocked_apis.notes: Market data uses live Yahoo Finance API. Profile persists to MongoDB. Age Pension uses 2025-2026 Services Australia rates.
